text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: And my favorite scene in this volume is when the protagonist faces the enemy champion in a gallant duel. It's truly riveting!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I completely agree. Personally, I was very pleased
with the way this volume incorporated aspects of
real-world mythology.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's important to note that it delves into rather
realistic concepts, despite being a work of fiction.
The training methods are quite feasible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the library to find Zenno Rob Roy,
Mejiro Ardan, and Biwa Hayahide having a
discussion in hushed tones.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello. I'm sorry—were we being too loud?
choice_data_list: Not at all. What are you talking about?
Not at all. What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We're sharing our impressions of the latest
volume in this novel series. It's a very intriguing
book...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It's simply amazing! I could talk about it forever!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's a slight problem however. There aren't
many others with whom we can discuss the latest
volume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's... absolutely correct. We've found
ourselves unable to fully express all the passion
we feel towards this book.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It's such a shame...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the book's a hidden gem? In that case, I
can see why they'd feel disheartened about not
having enough people to discuss it with.
choice_data_list: I think I'll try reading it too.
I think I'll try reading it too.

Can you tell me what makes it such a fantastic
read?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the book's a hidden gem? In that case, I
can see why they'd feel disheartened about not
having enough people to discuss it with.
choice_data_list: I think I'll try reading it too.
I think I'll try reading it too.

Can you tell me what makes it such a fantastic
read?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All of their eyes seem to light up at that instant.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-you really mean it?! I'm so happy to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Your thoughtfulness is much appreciated. Hehe,
how wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I believe this library has every volume in the
series. I'll fetch them right away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, even Hayahide is enthused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three Umamusume are delighted by my
decision. They really are passionate about books.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having the opportunity to assist them fills my own
heart with joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though for some reason, I can't help but feel this
joy might be short-lived...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...And that's volume thirty-four. This is the entire
series of books, including the latest volume.
choice_data_list: How can there be so many?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In front of Hayahide looms what can only be
described as a mountain of books!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's also a spin-off series that comprises
twelve volumes. I'll go and retrieve those, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait, Hayahide. Could you bring along the
series guide as well?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, absolutely.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow, volume six brings back so many memories! I
loved the hero's training arc!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should read all the previous volumes
again. I might discover new details or gain a
different perspective on things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've heard of this series, but I had no idea how
insanely long it is.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I think you've caught on. There aren't
many people to discuss the latest volume with
because so few people have read all of the
previous ones.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wonder if this is too much to ask of you...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Really?! I'm so thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My pride as a trainer keeps me from backing
down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd walk through fire if it meant putting a smile on
a student's face!
choice_data_list:
(Time to surmount the towering mountain
before me!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I stay up late reading every night for a very lengthy period.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, not a problem! Are you interested in reading
the series?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew. We need to dig deep and sell Trainer on
the books' strong points.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trio begin their pitch in a somewhat
exuberant manner.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
This series follows a protagonist who has no
special powers on their journey to becoming a
hero!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The depth of the history and world-building in
these novels is such that reading them is like
poring over the annals of an entire world.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The protagonist is so quick-witted that you end
up impressed with how realistic and logical the
novels are, especially for a fantasy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They continue discussing the novels with palpable
glee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing them so happy fills my own heart with joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though for some reason, I can't help but feel this
joy might be short-lived...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And what's more! The series has a wealth of
foreshadowing! The story is so painstakingly
crafted!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
There are events in volume thirty-two that were
hinted at as far back as volume three! Nobody
even realized it was foreshadowing at the time!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I can't go into any more detail lest I spoil
something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Many of the events borrow heavily from
real-world mythology, so the ideas presented in
the series are truly worthy of analysis.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The motifs and symbolism that appear in the tales
of past events often play into future
developments in the story, so it's also fascinating
from a historical point of view.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but I can't go into any more detail without
spoiling things.
choice_data_list: (Such fiery passion! I think I might get singed!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More than an hour has passed, but none of them
are showing any signs of slowing down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gravely underestimated their fervor for these
books!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, please read up to volume eight.
Its unique depiction of the laws of physics within
a fantasy world is truly brilliant.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But I can't go into any more detail or I'll spoil it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come to think of it, the protagonist's
perspective on the idea of being a hero in volume
twelve is very compelling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The way volume twenty-one examined the
historical motifs it depicted was strikingly
innovative.

text_block_list.name: Rob Roy & Ardan
text_block_list.text: You will?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That was the only response I could possibly give...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If it's to put a smile on a student's face, then no
task is too demanding for any trainer worth their
salt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no choice but to dive right into the fiery
embrace of their ardent passion.
